reference_report: The patient is sleeping in bed. He lets out a loud groan and has versive head turn to the right. He has right upper extremity extension with left upper extremity flexion, followed by tonic-clonic activity. Later, the patient is unable to remember events preceding this seizure.
inference_report: Patient initially appears still, then shifts to a tonic stiffening phase with right arm extension and left arm flexion, accompanied by a blank stare and rightward head version. Subsequently, clonic jerks become evident, evolving into bilateral tonic-clonic movements involving both arms and legs with a rhythmic pattern. The patient remains unresponsive throughout the seizure.
